# Generated by scripts/generate_raw_material_local_map_modes.py - do not edit by hand.
# Displays harvest-neutral local_<good>_output_modifier for every parsed raw_material good.
# Red/yellow/green classified diverging scale. Values are additive percentages (0.1 = +10%).
# Variable harvest effects are excluded; all modes mark matching raw-material locations with stripes.
# Geography index = 2 keeps these in the terrain/climate bucket.

@zoom_step_near = 2
@data_gradient_alpha_inside = 1
@data_gradient_alpha_outside = 1
@data_gradient_width = 0.25
@data_gradient_color_mult = 0.9
@data_edge_width = 0
@data_edge_sharpness = 0.01
@data_edge_alpha = 0
@data_edge_color_mult = 0
@data_before_lighting_blend = 0.5
@data_after_lighting_blend = 0.5

pp_local_horses_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_horses_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_horses_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_horses_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_horses_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_horses_productivity_map_value < 0.16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_horses_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.16
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_horses_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:horses
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_clay_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_clay_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_clay_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_clay_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_clay_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_clay_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_clay_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_clay_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:clay
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}

pp_local_sand_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sand_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sand_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sand_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sand_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sand_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sand_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sand_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:sand
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_coal_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coal_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coal_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coal_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coal_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coal_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coal_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coal_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:coal
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_iron_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_iron_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_iron_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_iron_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_iron_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_iron_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_iron_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_iron_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:iron
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_copper_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_copper_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_copper_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_copper_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_copper_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_copper_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_copper_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_copper_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:copper
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_goods_gold_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:goods_gold
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_silver_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silver_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silver_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silver_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silver_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silver_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silver_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silver_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:silver
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_stone_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_stone_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_stone_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_stone_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_stone_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_stone_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_stone_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_stone_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:stone
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_tin_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tin_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tin_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tin_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tin_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tin_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tin_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tin_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:tin
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_lead_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lead_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lead_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lead_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lead_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lead_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lead_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lead_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:lead
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_silk_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silk_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silk_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silk_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silk_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silk_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silk_productivity_map_value < 0.27
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_silk_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.27
					divide = 0.48
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:silk
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_dyes_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < -0.57
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.13
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.57
					divide = 0.52
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:dyes
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_incense_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_incense_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_incense_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_incense_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_incense_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_incense_productivity_map_value < 0.16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_incense_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.16
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_incense_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:incense
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_tea_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tea_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tea_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tea_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tea_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tea_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tea_productivity_map_value < 0.27
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tea_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.27
					divide = 0.48
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:tea
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_cocoa_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < 0.2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.2
					divide = 0.08
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:cocoa
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_coffee_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:coffee
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_fiber_crops_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < -0.34
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.36
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.34
					divide = 0.29
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:fiber_crops
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_ivory_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:ivory
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
