	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_lumber_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < -0.49
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.21
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.49
					divide = 0.44
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < 0.16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.16
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:lumber
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_salt_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_salt_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_salt_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_salt_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_salt_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_salt_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_salt_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_salt_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:salt
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_medicaments_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < -0.33
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.37
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.33
					divide = 0.28
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:medicaments
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_gems_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_gems_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_gems_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_gems_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_gems_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_gems_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_gems_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_gems_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:gems
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_pearls_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:pearls
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_amber_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_amber_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_amber_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_amber_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_amber_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_amber_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_amber_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_amber_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:amber
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_saltpeter_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:saltpeter
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_alum_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_alum_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_alum_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_alum_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_alum_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_alum_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_alum_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_alum_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:alum
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_wine_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wine_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wine_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wine_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wine_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wine_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wine_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wine_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:wine
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_elephants_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:elephants
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_marble_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_marble_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_marble_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_marble_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_marble_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_marble_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_marble_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_marble_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:marble
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_mercury_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:mercury
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_saffron_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < 0.29
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.29
					divide = 0.46
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:saffron
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_pepper_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:pepper
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_cloves_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < 0.16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.16
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:cloves
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_chili_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_chili_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_chili_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_chili_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_chili_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_chili_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_chili_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_chili_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:chili
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_cotton_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < 0.2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.2
					divide = 0.08
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:cotton
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_sugar_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:sugar
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_tobacco_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < 0.16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.16
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:tobacco
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
