	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_wool_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wool_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wool_productivity_map_value < -0.62
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.08
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wool_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.62
					divide = 0.57
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wool_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wool_productivity_map_value < 0.16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wool_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.16
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wool_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:wool
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_wild_game_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < -0.6
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.6
					divide = 0.35
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:wild_game
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_fur_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fur_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fur_productivity_map_value < -0.43
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.27
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fur_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.43
					divide = 0.38
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fur_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fur_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fur_productivity_map_value < 0.27
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fur_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.27
					divide = 0.48
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:fur
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_fish_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fish_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fish_productivity_map_value < -0.31
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.39
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fish_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.31
					divide = 0.26
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fish_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fish_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fish_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fish_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:fish
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_wheat_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < -0.45
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.45
					divide = 0.4
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.27
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.16
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.27
					divide = 0.48
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:wheat
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_maize_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_maize_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_maize_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_maize_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_maize_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_maize_productivity_map_value < 0.19
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.14
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_maize_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.19
					divide = 0.09
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_maize_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:maize
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_rice_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_rice_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_rice_productivity_map_value < -0.46
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.24
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_rice_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.46
					divide = 0.41
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_rice_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_rice_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_rice_productivity_map_value < 0.27
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_rice_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.27
					divide = 0.48
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:rice
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_millet_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_millet_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_millet_productivity_map_value < -0.39
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.31
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_millet_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.39
					divide = 0.34
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_millet_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_millet_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_millet_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_millet_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:millet
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_legumes_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_legumes_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_legumes_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_legumes_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_legumes_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_legumes_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_legumes_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_legumes_productivity_map_value < 0.18
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_legumes_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.13
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_legumes_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_legumes_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.18
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_legumes_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_legumes_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:legumes
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_potato_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_potato_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_potato_productivity_map_value < -0.43
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_potato_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.27
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_potato_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_potato_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.43
					divide = 0.38
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_potato_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_potato_productivity_map_value < 0.16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_potato_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_potato_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_potato_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.16
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_potato_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_potato_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:potato
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_POTATO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_POTATO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_POTATO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_POTATO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_POTATO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_POTATO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_POTATO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_POTATO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_livestock_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_livestock_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_livestock_productivity_map_value < -0.26
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_livestock_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.44
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_livestock_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_livestock_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.26
					divide = 0.21
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_livestock_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_livestock_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_livestock_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_livestock_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_livestock_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_livestock_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_livestock_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:livestock
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_olives_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_olives_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_olives_productivity_map_value < -0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_olives_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_olives_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_olives_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_olives_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_olives_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_olives_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_olives_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_olives_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_olives_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_olives_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:olives
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OLIVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OLIVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OLIVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OLIVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OLIVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OLIVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OLIVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OLIVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_fruit_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fruit_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fruit_productivity_map_value < -0.57
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_fruit_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.13
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fruit_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_fruit_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.57
					divide = 0.52
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fruit_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fruit_productivity_map_value < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_fruit_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fruit_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_fruit_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_fruit_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_fruit_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:fruit
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FRUIT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FRUIT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FRUIT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FRUIT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FRUIT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FRUIT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FRUIT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FRUIT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_beeswax_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value < -0.7
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value < -0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.7
					divide = 0.42
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value < -0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.28
					divide = 0.23
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value < 0.05
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value < 0.16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value < 0.28
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.16
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value < 0.75
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
				factor = {
					value = pp_beeswax_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.28
					divide = 0.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:beeswax
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_DEFICIT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCELLENT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_TOP }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}
